subject: docs(testing): add TESTING_GUIDE.md for manual test scenarios
body:
Create comprehensive manual testing guide covering all 15 feature areas:
first launch, chat creation/joining, messaging, tone tags, editing,
reactions, replies, deletion, message info/reporting, notifications,
PWA installation, desktop layout, chat management, and rate limiting.

Includes regression checklist for pre-release verification.
Fills the gap in the standard 9-file documentation set.

Tags: documentation, testing, quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: claude-md-alignment
Semver: patch
